column2: Verify CAA Authorization Officer Fails to Request Insurance and Ground Survey for High Risk UAS Operation
column3: ['Log in as a CAA authorization officer. ', 'Request insurance and ground survey for a high-risk UAS operation. ', 'Proceed with the request. ']
column4: ['Successfully log in with valid credentials. ', 'The system accepts the request and displays an option to proceed or cancel. ', 'The system returns an error message indicating that both services have been denied due to high risk. ']
